programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "In 1895, British archaeologists find and open the tomb of Egyptian Princess Ananka with nefarious consequences."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After plotting his next caper from prison, the Penguin disguises himself as an umbrella shop owner.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock meet Abraham Lincoln and Surak of Vulcan and must do battle with some of history's most terrible villains.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A lizard-man creature kills subterranean workers who have stolen its eggs.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Dr. Smith disposes of a plant that has grown out of control, but once outside the plant manages to attach itself to the Jupiter 2. The plant apparently believes that Dr. Smith is its mother, meanwhile the ship is attacked by a brave space warrior.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Nelson and the Seaview crew battle enemy agents in a daring attempt to save a kidnapped U.S. scientist.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A new giant inspector comes up with a way to track a metal unique to Earth. The Spindrift crew initially manages to get rid of all of it... until they realize that Dan has a metal pin in his leg made of the material.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Tony and Doug materialize on the first manned flight to Mars, where their added weight forces a change in flight plans.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: David rushes to help when people are frozen to death.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matt and Walt race to find the landing device before astronauts perish in the re-entry."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.sub-title: The Mamas And The Papas (s2, ep)
programme.desc: As a class project, the Bayside gang pairs up for mock weddings, but problems arise when Lisa becomes allergic to Screech, her mock husband.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Kelly breaks her arm, the gang helps take care of her baby brother.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Confident of Bayside's winning streak, Zack bets on a wrestling match, only to find that Slater's quit the team and has been replaced with Screech!

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After discovering she is failing in science class, Kelly is tutored by Screech, and soon develops a crush on him.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack uses his subliminal advertising course to get Kelly to go with him to the Sweetheart Dance. But when his plan backfires, the whole school vies for his affection.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The gang starts a business selling friendship bracelets, but Zack's tough work schedule tests the limits of their friendship.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan becomes convinced she's got no talent after failing to make it into a ballet recital. As a result, she drops out of ballet and tries (the considerably louder) tap dancing instead. Meanwhile, Mike sets out to make a family dinner.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan competes in a popularity contest at school. With Peter as her campaign manager and the rest of the family pitching in, she's got a great chance of winning - if she can stop making promises to her classmates that she can't possibly keep.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and Potsie plan to host a poker night at the Cunningham house as Howard and Marion will be out of town. However, their plans change when three young women stop by after their car breaks down, and Potsie invites them to stay the night.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne is allowed to stay at a convent for a couple of weeks, but she soon gets on the Mother Superior's bad side when she has trouble keeping a vow of silence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The mayor calls in an investigator from the state capital to help solve a string of cow thefts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky and Ethel and Fred are bored with each other so the gals head off to Palm Springs for a break. Rock Hudson guests as himself and has a hand in getting the couples back together.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver has gotten a job as a caddy and is quickly running around the golf course chasing balls. However, all innocence is broken when one of the guys, Beaver is caddying for cheats in order to win a bet. Soon, Beaver begins wrestling with his conscience over whether or not to tell anyone."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver comes home with the news that he applied to appear on a local television show called 'Teen Forum' and has been accepted. Beaver gets out of classes for the taping and all his classmates are treated to being able to watch him on TV during class. However, what Beaver, his friends and family don't know is that the show tapes each episode a week in advance.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts, Drysdale and Jane are heading to their castle in England. Their plane ride isn’t the easiest, especially for Drysdale and another passenger. Jethro smuggles Elly’s turkey, buzzard, on board, and Drysdale is attacked by it in the bathroom, as well as another man who has the misfortune of being seated near the clan.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale tries to keep the Clampetts in Beverly Hills by telling them there is going to be a Possum Day held there. Granny decides to run for Possum Queen in Beverly Hills, and Drysdale convinces her that she is running against Mrs. Drysdale. Meanwhile, Drysdale is desperate to actually get a Possum Day to happen for the Clampetts.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: After hearing Gilligan drumming, Ms. Howell is inspired to form an island orchestra. Unfortunately, the drumming has also attracted the attention of a neighboring island's tribe, who are convinced that a war is about to start.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways overhear gangsters discussing buried treasure and threatening their lives.

programme.title: Return to Mayberry
programme.desc: "Reprising their roles in the original 'Andy Griffith Show,' Andy returns to Mayberry to run again for sheriff, only to discover his former deputy, Barney, has also entered the race. "

programme.title: Mayberry R.F.D.
programme.sub-title: Andy And Helen Get Married (s1, ep)
programme.desc: Andy and Helen marry, and Aunt Bee becomes Sam's housekeeper.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "The name Christopher Lee has become synonymous with LEGO. As a collector, builder and LEGO Masters champion, he pretty much knows about, built or has collected it all. Today, he's invited us to his home where we'll check out his phenomenal collection which includes the iconic Galaxy Explorer, his beloved Airport Shuttle, not to mention his truly one-of-a-kind Prototype Factory Bricks. Our expert Aaron Fike, who owns a few LEGO stores himself, will be tasked with trying to appraise Christopher's collection and then come up with a LEGO trade worthy enough to convince our collector to "LEGO" of one his favorite collectibles."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: General 'Iron Guts' Kelly arrives for an inspection, and ends up dying in Margaret's tent. Hawkeye and Trapper help the General's aide smuggle him out of camp. The next day he is reported killed at the front, as that is where he would have wanted to die.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The O.R. is filled with more wounded than the unit can handle. Hawkeye does heart massage on a soldier, which saves his life, but he dies four hours later. Sidney Freedman drops in during the deluge, and is dragged into the fray by Hawkeye.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith's antique locket is missing and Archie sees it as a way to collect from the insurance company to buy a new television set. Confident of getting the insurance money, Archie orders a new color set, only to have an insurance adjuster arrive at the house to question the claim.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie has been suffering from a terrible pain in his back and has become a terrible pain to Edith, who has been waiting on him hand and foot. When the doctor takes a look at him, he orders Archie to be admitted to the hospital for tests. This is where Archie befriends the other patient in his room, but because of a partition, Archie doesn't realize the man is black.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie begins to realize that he's not as young as he used to be when he finds that he may need glasses. To make matters worse, middle-aged Archie can only envy the eternally youthful outlook of his friend and contemporary, Bill Mulheron. He is especially impressed that the toned, flashily garbed Bill has managed to attract a sexy young bedmate named Tina. However, Archie soon discovers all is not as it seems.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is searching the house for a magazine to prove to Mike that he was right concerning a debate that they are having. However, Archie oversteps his boundaries and searches Mike's room where he discovers a poem that Mike once wrote. This leads to a huge argument concerning privacy and Mike storms out to Lionel's while Gloria and Edith storm out and have a slumber party at the apartment of one of Gloria's friends.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Martha Raye And Mel Torme
programme.desc: "Guests Martha Raye and Mel Torme. Originally aired on 03/23/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Barbara Eden And Jonathan Winters
programme.desc: "Guests Barbara Eden and Jonathan Winters. Originally aired on 12/04/67."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob goes to a secluded cabin to write his novel, but drives himself crazy.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Did Rob see a UFO?

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ed handcuffs himself to Ralph on their way to the Raccoon convention.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Troopers follow the tracks from a frozen pond into a diner. Inside they find a soda jerk, a bus driver and his seven passengers. The bus driver is certain only six people boarded his bus.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: Last Seen Wearing Blue Jeans (s1, ep)
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl is inadvertently driven to Mexico by a dangerous car thief, who is unaware she is sleeping in the back seat.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A communist agent, Karl Maur, spots Paris on vacation, knocks him out and turns him over to Dr. Tabor, who is a brain specialist and mind control expert. Unable to break Paris, Tabor blanks out Paris' memories and uses an implanted electrode to program his mind.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.sub-title: Detour On A Road Going Nowhere
programme.desc: While working as a hotel steward in Wyoming, Kimble is forced to run after learning that another hotel employee has stolen hotel funds, and Kimble becomes the suspect. Kimble escapes on a tour bus containing a bickering couple called the Langners, a visit

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell assumes an undercover identity to avenge the murder of his close friend, police lieutenant Manny Quinlan."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police and Secret Service undertake maximum security for a Presidential visit to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday clashes with a woman writer gathering research material for an article on policewomen.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed feels a strong sense of accomplishment when he stumbles upon a large stash of narcotics as he secures a residence after executing a traffic warrant with Malloy and Officer Ed Wells. He's in for a rude awakening at the trial, however, when he's cross examined by the defense attorney.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin their shift responding to a disgruntled tenant who is holding his landlord at knife point. Later, they investigate a rash of property theft from multiple homes in a quiet neighborhood, stake out an apparent bag of laundry left on the side of the road and search for a runaway boy who gets himself into a life-threatening situation.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony and Bill have a podcast! Maybe. All they need is a title. And something to talk about."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward have noticed the Wally has been spending quite a bit of his time at the movie theater but it's not to see the movies. He's been eyeing the pretty young lady who works in the box office. Thanks to Eddie, Wally works up enough courage to ask her out but quickly sees another side to the young lady that is a bit too mature for Wally's taste.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally is let down when he learns that he didn't get the sports scholarship from State University. However, he does learn that Lumpy did get one and this leads him to throw a party in Lumpy's honor. However, half way through the party, Fred calls with some unfortunate news for Lumpy, the scholarship is no longer available due to Lumpy's grades.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Blonde Bonanza
programme.desc: When a shady promoter is killed after a crooked modeling deal, his intended victim is suspected of his murder—but the truth in this case is more than skin deep.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When he is accused of murdering his wealthy wife, an old acquaintance hires Matlock to defend him. The more digging Matlock does, the more he begins to suspect other family members.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The father of a man Gerard prosecuted kidnaps the DA's daughter.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jason writes a song to sing with Bobby Bigalow's band

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Doc's nurse from the war, Abbie, comes to Dodge. So does Coney who's out to kill Matt for putting him in jail for 5 years. Coney gets sick and Abbie takes care of him."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Dolph Quince (Jack Elam) sends Phil Jacks (Ken Curtis) into Dodge to bring Marshall Dillon out to their herd to help with Jayhawkers."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After an attempt on his life Ben lays low, allowing even his close friends to believe him to be gone in an effort to thwart the plans of a scheming politician.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Jake and Fay Owens, old friends of Micah, are the McCain's new neighbors. Jake quickly develops an unreasoning jealousy of Lucas with Fay.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one's more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint, at a grave, sees a man stabbed in the back with a note saying, "Deliver to Beauty Jamison." As that is the daughter of the man interred he pays a visit and sees a woman trying to continue a legacy with the locals trying to break her.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The firemen are puzzled by Boot's strange behavior. Meanwhile, paramedics rescue a woman whose sports car is pinned under a gas truck and investigate a series of unusual incidents in the home of a woman attempting to cook a meal for her boyfriend and his mother. An unconscious man is brought in to the hospital suffering from internal bleeding. Dr. Early deals with the victim of a curse. An explosion in a hospital lab endangers a number of workers and important records.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When spring arrives, Klinger gets word from home that his sweetheart back in Toledo wants to marry him. Henry arranges for Father Mulcahy to do this over short wave radio. Radar falls in love with a nurse, while a grateful patient won't leave Hawkeye alone, and even threatens Major Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper gets an ulcer and a ticket home. Unfortunately, his going-away party is spoiled by a new Army regulation, which forces him to stay.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank throws his back out while spending the evening with Margaret, and ends up in traction. He promptly applies for the Purple Heart, having been 'technically' wounded at a frontline unit. Tommy Gillis, an old friend of Hawkeye's, is writing a book about the war, and pays him a visit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With a temporary transfer of personnel between the 4077th and the 8063rd, Captain Roy Dupree replaces Hawkeye, while Lorraine Anderson makes eyes at Charles. Fearing this to be permanent, Charles and B.J. successfully conspire to have Dupree permanently removed from the 4077th.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful manicurist from the city comes to Floyd's to set up shop. She makes all the wives in town extremely nervous as she manicures their husbands.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee falls for traveling handyman Henry Wheeler, Andy soon learns that Wheeler is not as nice as he appears.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It is time for spring tonic, and the Countess Maria returns to meet with her good friends the Clampetts, as well as get some tonic. And after the Clampetts learn Maria is single again, having lost her husband at a party, Granny sees this as the time for Jed to make his move on the Countess.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Norton buy a T.V. set together and constantly fight over what to watch.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses the car of an SS man who's just married Klink's old girlfriend and is honeymooning in Paris, where Hogan needs to pass radios to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets himself sent to the hospital so he can get information from a wounded agent.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. What's more, he can't recall his own identity.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Traveling Treasure
programme.desc: His fishing trip ruined, Mason is on the case when a deep-sea fisherman aboard a rented boat is found dead.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe Friday and his partner, Bill Gannon, encounter a freaked-out young LSD user. This is the famous "Blue Boy" episode.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Dan, an underworld kingpin, hatches a plan to punish a singer who killed his brother.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: After a terrible accident leaves a man completely paralyzed, people who encounter him think he is dead, though he is very much alive.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The uncle of a young woman has disappeared after giving her $300,000 dollars in cash for safekeeping. Mannix must find out where the money comes from.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.sub-title: The Girl In The Electric Coffin
programme.desc: A search for a missing girl leads Frank into a case of murder and a romantic triangle when Cannon is hired by the child's mother.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A crazy man abducts Betty.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to get citizens to take part in a crime-prevention campaign.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A businessman's war against drug addiction results in a new group whose motto is "freaking out isn't in."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 142 -- As High As You Are
programme.desc: As Malloy and Reed's patrol begins, an uneventful traffic stop becomes more interesting when something catches Malloy's eye. Later, they discover an unusual situation responding to a break-in at a hospital supply warehouse, which becomes even more odd when the warehouse owner and a group of revenge-seeking thugs show up at the scene. The shift ends in a fitting way when they are called to an apartment where a baby has been left unattended with a pet lion.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and several civilians are taken hostage after he is shot and seriously injured by robbers while stopping for lunch at Duke's Longhorn Café.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver is all set to go with Eddie and Wally to hook up a AM/FM car radio in Eddie's car but June stops him and insists he go to the grocery store to pick up the items he had promised. This leads Beaver to give June the cold shoulder treatment while playing up to Ward.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward go away for a couple of days and leave Uncle Billy to stay with Wally and Beaver. Beaver quickly realizes Billy runs a much looser ship than Ward and June and feels as if he can get away with more things. However, he's soon in for a rude awakening when he helps Gilbert sneak into the movies.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ruinous Road
programme.desc: When a land development deal goes sour, Mason defends engineer Adam Conrad, accused of a murder committed in an old house that has something sinister hidden underneath it.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Detective Joe Peters has been accused of taking bribes and murdering a fence; he also is suspected in the death of a fellow cop. Matlock takes the case and finds himself investigating the police force.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Lonnie makes a heartbreaking discovery about a woman he dated in high school.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy falls for a poet who is visiting his college

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "An old friend of the family comes to Dodge looking for Kitty, but when he finds out she's a saloon owner, he's dismayed. Intent on defending her honor wherever she is insulted, he nearly gets himself killed."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "While Chester is teaching Miss Kitty guitar playing and singing technics, the cowpokes at the Long Branch are making quite a fuss over Frog mouth Kate. Kate has a fondness for a younger man almost half her age (Billy Daunt)."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Candy falls in love with Tisha Sterling, a young woman being blackmailed by a man named Passmore, a marshal from another town who pretends to be her cousin.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher—a former outlaw whom he vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Mary Ellen is an orphan traveling west to join family; members of the train reject her due to her surly disposition. Her only friend is Sally Mayhew, another girl traveling west with her family dying of consumption.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John are accused of stealing money from a victim. A premature delivery and a blinded man result from a car crash. A perilous rescue involves a plane that might explode.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Mail from home worries Henry that Lorraine may be seeing other men. Father Mulcahy presides over a Jewish circumcision ceremony for the Korean-born son of a US GI.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry's departure to Tokyo leaves Major Burns in charge of the 4077th. He declares total prohibition of alcohol, which leads to a near riot in the camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: There Is Nothing Like A Nurse
programme.desc: The nurses are evacuated when the threat of an enemy parachute drop arises. Hawkeye and Trapper try to enliven everyone's spirits while they are gone.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sick and tired of having liver and fish for an 11-day stretch, Hawkeye, driven near to insanity, starts a riot in the mess tent. He and Trapper then orders spare ribs and sauce from his favorite barbecue joint—in Chicago.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A ne'er-do-well vagrant has a bad influence on Opie.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An itinerant peddler comes to town (Don Rickles) and sells Barney, Floyd and Goober defective goods. After he disregards Andy's warning, he finds himself in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beatnik Sheldon Epps returns with his friends from the Parthenon West Coffee House, asking Jed for money so they can keep their hangout. Drysdale is hoping to close the place down. But his plans fail when Jed befriends the hippies and supports them, providing music and lights.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph's advice to a lodge brother on how to be head of the household has his wife (Alice's sister) in tears.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Crittendon interferes as Hogan tries to help a defecting scientist, whom they were ordered to kill.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps Klink fall in love with General Burkhalter's sister to get his mind off not being promoted.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Posthumous Painter
programme.desc: Artist Jack Culross fakes his own suicide and sees the sales of his paintings go through the roof. His only oversight was forgetting to inform his wife of the scheme.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A neo-Nazi psycho has planted a bomb somewhere in L.A. Friday and Gannon have to find it.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A real estate agent becomes obsessed with the idea that his new cook is a serial killer.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A gambling addict cannot resist the lure of $200,000.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A blind crook and Mannix are both on the trail of some valuable stolen jewels.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A murderer has blamed his crime on a innocent cop and Cannon is out to prove who the real killer is.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A former gangster goes into hiding to finish an indictment he'd been writing about the mob.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Milner and Kent McCord appear as Officers Malloy and Reed to portray the policeman's role in society.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed become envious of officer wells, who has been given a coveted assignment in the newly established astro helicopter division. Out on patrol, they require assistance saving a wealthy elderly couple who get locked in their heavily fortified basement safe, and then use air support to track down robbery suspects who escape on a motorcycle.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are the first to respond to a downtown rooftop sniper who has been indiscriminately shooting at anyone he can find with his scoped rifle. After risking their lives to get civilians out of his line of sight, they become lead participants in the S.W.A.T. team's attempt to neutralize the suspect.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony prepares for a very special audition!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward are excited when they learn that Aunt Martha has made arrangements to send Beaver to a prep school in New England. However, Beaver quickly realizes he will miss his friends as they are all entering Mayfield High School next year. This puts Beaver in a delicate position: how to tell Aunt Martha he doesn't want to go without hurting her feelings.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally has his mind pretty much made up about going to Ward's alma mater, State University, and he's even considering joining Ward's old fraternity. However, both Eddie and Wally think twice when they hear from a college student that that's the worst fraternity on campus, but Ward has already sent out his letter of recommendation for both of them.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Jealous Journalist
programme.desc: The drowning death of a newspaper executive during a fishing trip sets off all kinds of repercussions at the newspaper.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock reluctantly agrees to take the case of free-spirited rock star Angel. The musician has been accused of killing her manager, and due to an alcohol-induced blackout can't even offer an alibi for the night of the murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A drug dealing slumlord is murdered by his accomplices.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John takes on a loan to improve the business and he gets a big order

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "When another doctor shows up in Dodge promising lower doctor's fees and miracle cures, Doc gets angry and many Dodge citizens think Doc Adams has quit as Dodge's doctor."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Joe Plummer is mad and jealous because his boss Mike Blocker is marrying Tilda. So he tries to frame Blocker for murder."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Cartwright cattle drive stops in the town of River Bend. There they help Lilah Holden, an old friend of Candy's, out of a jam.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A veteran returns with tales of heroism and the fate of Milly's brother in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A head wound wipes out Lucas' memory, leaving him with only one clue: he's wearing an outlaw's gun.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the wagon horses start to die of a disease, Adams is forced to send two feuding men to buy new horses with his emergency money. Two horses return, but with only one man, leading Adams to wonder whether he made a mistake.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John is audited by the IRS. A man hit on the head wants to be treated by a doctor, not the paramedics. A child is rescued from a locked car. A pregnant girl has difficulty breathing. A professional medical con man shows up at Rampart. A construction worker is trapped when part of the building his crew is working on collapses, and he wants Roy to remove his leg before the rest of the building falls.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye records a letter to his dad, detailing the exploits of a mad Turkish soldier who calls Hawkeye a "damn good Joe," the unfortunate loss of the corpse of a Luxembourg soldier (who turns out not to be dead), Lt. Henri-Batiste LeClerc and a gun-happy officer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A local dog bites Radar, and the camp conducts a search to find the pooch so that Radar doesn't have to undergo a series of painful rabies vaccinations. Hawkeye defies Frank, to take care of a GI who's suffering from a case of hysterical paralysis.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Greek Colonel thanks the 4077th by giving them food and drink for an Easter celebration. But the feast is foiled when softhearted Radar saves the main course from the spit—a lamb, which Radar tricks Henry into giving a medical discharge and sends home to Ottumwa, Iowa. Thus, Hawkeye and Trapper invent the famed Spam Lamb!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp is under fire and is swamped with wounded. They are being attacked by their own artillery in a frightening "friendly fire" incident. After Trapper and Margaret get trapped in the supply tent together, Frank's jealousy of Trapper drives him to propose to Margaret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jeff Pruitt, a farmer from the hills, comes to Mayberry in search of a wife. He enlists Barney and Andy's help and ends up picking Thelma Lou!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stubborn but charming lady speeder makes life difficult for Andy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly and Jethro join the beatniks at the Parthenon West, and Granny tries to get them out. But her attempts fail, and she becomes a beatnik herself, after inventing "The Tater Digger,” a new dance. Jed is all for the young ones expressing themselves, but once he sees Granny dressed the way she is and acting the way she is, he changes his mind.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph tries to learn how to play golf to impress his boss, and, of course, the situation turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When a POW is caught at the processing location after Stalag 13, Hogan suspects there is a traitor in the underground. Newkirk and LeBeau help him find out who it is.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After receiving a "Dear John" letter, Carter asks Hogan if he can escape and get back to his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Injured Innocent
programme.desc: After a test driver deliberately crashes a race car equipped with an experimental engine, claims the collision paralyzed him and then ends up murdered, Mason defends the investor behind the engine's creation.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon help an employee rescue her kidnapped boss.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Albert Pelham is slowly being replaced at home and at work by a double.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When the husband of an unhappy marriage disappears, the neighbors suspect foul play.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Maggie escapes from a deadly accident by a hair. The felon is a militant taxi driver. Mannix has the suspicion that he has already committed murder once, that of his colleague, Maggie's boss.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A syndicate boss may just be next in line to be murdered when Cannon investigates a case involving a triple homicide.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby looks for a member of Chicano street-gang who is the only witness to a millionaire's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 91-year-old apartment-house manager gets involved in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives go to work on several cases connected with the department's business-office division.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed see the same drunk twice in one night, respond to a bar fight and engage in a high-speed pursuit with good samaritans who make a bad decision. They also search for a biker who tries to coerce a woman to repay a debt by riddling her apartment with buckshot.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed hope to find an impostor as they investigate a boxing promoter's accusation that a police detective stole $350 from him. In the meantime, they deal with a disgruntled wife who is in the process of destroying her own car in the middle of a downtown street, investigate a gun theft from a pawn shop, drive up on a home burglary in progress and obtain critical information while interrogating a suspected car thief.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Cartoons come to life in the real world with special guests Rob Paulsen and Randy Rogel of the Animaniacs."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie has been seeing one particular girl, Cindy Andrews, and she wants to give Eddie a birthday gift, so she decides to knit a sweater. She uses Wally as a model and he begins spending so much time at Cindy's he arrouses the suspicions of Julie, Eddie, Lumpy, Beaver and his parents.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has been assigned to write a book report on 'The Three Musketeers.' However he's waited right down to the wire to get reading and quickly realizes that he'll never get finished. So, he decides to watch the movie that's going to be on TV and write his book report based on the movie.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Thermal Thief
programme.desc: Attorney Ken Kramer comes to the aid of an alleged thief accused of stealing a $50,000 necklace.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Professor Erskine Tate wakes from a drunken stupor behind the wheel of his car. He doesn't know how he got there or what happened. When he's accused of having hit a mailman during a drunken joyride, he goes to a former student, Matlock, for help.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A doctor plots to eliminate his wife -- and his mistress.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The reverend and teacher get married

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Gambler Ed Eby has a grudge against the Marshall and starts talking about how "big" someone would be if they were to kill Matt."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "When Onie Becker is shot down on the streets of Dodge after quarreling with Al Clovis in a poker game, everyone thinks Al Clovis committed the shooting. The plot thickens after Matt and Chester pursue Clovis on a train headed out of Dodge."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After Joe's friend, Steve, is killed in an accident, he takes over organizing a strike at the mine that the deceased had begun. As tensions rise, the miners threaten to disrupt the whole enterprise if their demands are not met.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCain's is released from jail after serving his sentence for stage coach robbery, but the money was never found. Lucas agrees to let the man work for him, but the new work hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory has arrived in North Fork and quickly purchases land, which includes the hotel and Milly Scott's store. She pays higher prices than the sellers feel their properties are worth. Everyone is happy until they find out that Lou really is an astute businesswoman.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Kitty Angel finds herself not welcome on the wagon train because of her past. When Flint returns to the train toting a sick indian baby, she has everyone's prejudices to deal with as well as the baby's life-threatening illness.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: When Johnny's policeman friend is injured in a car crash, the paramedics can't reach the hospital because another squad is using the biophone. A child with a mysterious malady turns out to be drunk. Roy and John assist at the hospital when the victims of a motorcycle gang war are brought in for treatment. An artist becomes trapped in his own sculpture. A father and son are trapped in a collapse at a construction site.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Camp activities include Henry's nervous delivery of a sex lecture, with Hawkeye and Trapper heckling, a Shirley Temple movie and a cookout.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Dr. Borelli visits the 4077th to demonstrate his artery transplant technique. Unfortunately, being so close to the front at the 4077th causes Borelli's drinking problem to interfere at the worst time—when a patient needs the transplant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye hits Major Burns and Houlihan is a witness. Despite Hawkeye and Trapper's claims that it wasn't intentional, Frank makes allegations against Hawkeye, and he is put in house arrest facing court martial. A female colonel is sent to inspect the nurses. When she cries "Rape!" when Burns visits her tent, Houlihan recants her story, and Burns, not Hawkeye, ends up under house arrest.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye, Houlihan and Klinger go to an aid station at the front. Working closely together under heavy fire and unsanitary medical conditions, the three return to camp with new found respect for one another.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Rich kid Ronald Bailey is jailed when he blatantly defies the law. As Bailey waits for his influential father to bail him out, Andy teaches him the lesson of self-responsibility.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Thieves pretend to be Hollywood producers in order to rob the Mayberry Bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in a hobby to occupy their time and to stop Jed from traveling around the neighborhood with a fix-it wagon. He shows Jed all types of hobbies, like collecting stamps and building a boat in a bottle. Jethro gets a hobby with these offers—getting the boat out of the bottle!

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.sub-title: A Woman's Work Is Never Done
programme.desc: Tired of Ralph's endless domestic complaints, Alice takes a job and leaves a maid to take care of the housework.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan hijacks a German bomber, and plans to use it to destroy an oil refinery and foil a German general who knows about the his operation.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink and two other prison camp kommandants are arrested for conspiring against General Burkhalter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in isolation.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Left-handed Liar
programme.desc: Health club instructor Ward Nichols wants to marry the daughter of his employer, but his estranged wife is pressuring him for money and claiming to be pregnant.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A new officer has been arrested for robbing a liquor store while on an undercover assignment.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.sub-title: Santa Claus And The Tenth Avenue Kid
programme.desc: A criminal fresh out of prison takes a job as Santa Claus for the holiday season.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A dishonest ex-museum curator uses a forged letter to get close to an elderly woman and her priceless vase.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When investigating a case of hit-and-run, Mannix gets caught amid the fronts of a mafia war.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: When an heir of a millionaire who prefers to live like a hermit is discovered to be missing, Cannon in hired to investigate and uncovers a mysterious case of murder and embezzlement. But the case is hampered by the hermit's attorney.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Due to circumstantial evidence, Betty's old flame is a prime suspect in a restaurant tycoon's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A pot-detecting pooch joins the police to stop marijuana smuggling.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's problem: is his temporary partner an aide—or an adversary?

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy spends a weekend afternoon attending a barbecue at Reed's home, where Reed lets him hold his newborn son for the first time and tries to set him up with his wife's friend. However, their relaxation is interrupted when they have to deal with a young neighbor who overdoses on drugs and becomes the target of his dealer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are rendered powerless when a drunken man with no flight experience decides to take a solo flight in a stolen airplane at a busy airport. Later, they try to locate a 17-year-old runaway living in a condemned home with a much older man, engage in a shootout with a convenience store robber and search for a booby-trapped bank safe that has been stolen with a tow truck.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward is given two tickets to a baseball game and is faced with an impossible decision. Should he take Wally or Beaver? Beaver lets him off the hook when he announces he has plans with Gilbert. However, when they fall through, Beaver changes his mind about the game and becomes convinced because he's the youngest he gets the short stick.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A school dance has Beaver with a major dilemma. He has two girls who ask him to go with them. However, he has a little problem, he accepted the first invitation but now wants out of it when he's asked by the second girl. This leads him to take some of Eddie's poor advice.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Golden Venom
programme.desc: Mason is hired to look into the death of his client's son, which occurred two years earlier. It is revealed that several people may have had reason to want the man out of the way.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a down-on-his luck Santa Claus (Tom McCabe) is accused of killing his avaricious landlord, Matlock finds himself defending the very unlikeable man.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Parkers investigation into a purse snatching reveals an abused woman.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy's dean asks him to take care of a 16-year-old genius college student for a weekend.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Men at the Long Branch believe one of the "saloon girls" brings them luck at Blackjack. Matt's suspicious and tries to run her and the dealer out of Dodge when men start killing each other over her."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Matt rescues a white woman (who was let go by the Cheyene) and a child from buffalo hunters then has to protect her from her Boston husband."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bitter, alcoholic Josh Carter makes life miserable for his wife, Sarah, and their children—until Hoss helps him mend his ways.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Marshal Torrance is heading home from a cattle sale with Lucas and Mark when the old lawman mysteriously disappears. They trace him to a nearby Mexican ghost town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Alphonso's wife gives birth, the bandits holding Marshal Torrance relax their guard, enabling Lucas and Mark to rescue the old man.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint, in love with a Mormon girl he can't marry, joins the Confederate Army. When he finds out that he won't be seeing any action on the battlefield, it may be too late for him and the girl he loves.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John buy an old fire engine, and Station 51 gets a new engine. A woman overdoses on LSD and Roy tries to talk her down, leading the two paramedics on a chase to the top of a building. Brackett treats a resilient gunshot victim. A politician suffers a heart attack and the station responds to a warehouse fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp prepares for a visit from General MacArthur. Klinger dresses as the Statue of Liberty as the General's jeep drives through the camp. MacArthur is so impressed, he salutes!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On payday, Frank buys two sets of pearls, a cheap imitation one for Margaret and a real one for his wife. After some talk, Radar gets Hawkeye $3,000 in lost earnings, Hawkeye gives it to Mulcahy for the orphans, but then the army wants the money back. Trapper wins big at poker after using Hawkeye's watch as a stake, so Hawkeye takes his winnings and gives them to the army to avoid a stay in the honeymoon suite of The Stockade Hilton.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Flagg blows into camp trying to obtain penicillin to barter for information. But Flagg comes down with appendicitis, and the only penicillin he gets is in the keister.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry finally gets his discharge. While he is tying things up, Burns prepares for his new command. Henry bids a tearful adieu, but not before Klinger turns up in an outrageous tropical outfit.

programme.title: Me-TV Special Presentation
programme.desc: "Cast members from "The Andy Griffith Show" gather to reminisce about the classic 1960s TV series."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts befriend Leroy Lester, an unappreciated accountant being replaced at the bank by a computer, and give him the rest, relaxation and vacation he deserves.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.sub-title: A Matter Of Life And Death
programme.desc: When Ralph thinks he's dying and sells the story to a magazine, he discovers it was a dog who was sick instead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A German officer threatens to expose Hogan unless he is paid a million dollars in diamonds.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is ordered to give a German general a briefcase containing a time bomb to assassinate Hitler.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a man decides to visit his hometown, he finds it exactly as it was when he was a child.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Brazen Bequest
programme.desc: Charles Cromwell, the president-elect of Euclid College, worries that some less than stellar moments from his past will be exposed when Maisie Freitag arrives at the college.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Four bandits wearing red masks commit a series of robberies.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Benjamin Stepp turns into a cold-blooded murderer after being fired from his job.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man buys an alibi so he can murder his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: After Mannix tracks down an assassin, he is shot and seriously injured. Having a breakdown, Mannix is diagnosed with psychosomatic blindness.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The reopening of the cold case of a salesgirl reveals that a bicycle she sold may be a clue to her death.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigation a fatal automobile accident, Barnaby uncovers a complex scheme to defraud a bank.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Norman Curtis, the railroad president, sends his basset hound to the Shady Rest for a change of scenery.
